title: On A Person Nicknamed The Marquis.
content:
Here lies a mock Marquis, whose titles were shamm'd;
        If ever he rise, it will be to be damn'd.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Burns, titled "On A Person Nicknamed The Marquis.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
